allow: Bash(cd packages/ui/src/components/ui && sed -i 's|from "@/lib/utils"|from "../../lib/utils"|g' *.tsx && sed -i 's|from "@/lib/create-safe-context"|from "../../lib/create-safe-context"|g' *.tsx && sed -i 's|from "@/components/ui/|from "./|g' *.tsx && sed -i 's|from "@/hooks/use-mobile"|from "../../hooks/use-mobile"|g' *.tsx && sed -i 's|from "@/hooks/use-infinite-scroll"|from "../../hooks/use-infinite-scroll"|g' *.tsx && echo "done top-level")

Bash(cd E:/Projects/app-template && for f in packages/ui/src/components/ui/*.tsx; do sed -i 's|from "@/lib/utils"|from "../../lib/utils"|g' "$f"; sed -i 's|from "@/lib/create-safe-context"|from "../../lib/create-safe-context"|g' "$f"; sed -i 's|from "@/components/ui/|from "./|g' "$f"; sed -i 's|from "@/hooks/use-mobile"|from "../../hooks/use-mobile"|g' "$f"; sed -i 's|from "@/hooks/use-infinite-scroll"|from "../../hooks/use-infinite-scroll"|g' "$f"; done && echo "done top-level")

Bash(cd E:/Projects/app-template && for f in packages/ui/src/components/ui/form/*.tsx; do sed -i 's|from "@/lib/utils"|from "../../../lib/utils"|g' "$f"; sed -i 's|from "@/components/ui/|from "../|g' "$f"; done && echo "done form")

Bash(cd E:/Projects/app-template && find apps/app/src -name '*.tsx' -o -name '*.ts' | grep -v 'apps/app/src/components/ui/' | while read f; do
  sed -i 's|from "@/components/ui/form/hooks"|from "@app/ui/components/form/hooks"|g' "$f"
  sed -i 's|from "@/components/ui/form/form-base"|from "@app/ui/components/form/form-base"|g' "$f"
  sed -i 's|from "@/components/ui/|from "@app/ui/components/|g' "$f"
  sed -i 's|from "@/lib/utils"|from "@app/ui/lib/utils"|g' "$f"
  sed -i 's|from "@/lib/create-safe-context"|from "@app/ui/lib/create-safe-context"|g' "$f"
  sed -i 's|from "@/hooks/use-mobile"|from "@app/ui/hooks/use-mobile"|g' "$f"
  sed -i 's|from "@/hooks/use-tablet"|from "@app/ui/hooks/use-tablet"|g' "$f"
  sed -i 's|from "@/hooks/use-infinite-scroll"|from "@app/ui/hooks/use-infinite-scroll"|g' "$f"
done && echo "done")
Bash(cd E:/Projects/app-template && grep -r 'from "@/components/ui/' apps/app/src --include='*.tsx' --include='*.ts' | grep -v 'apps/app/src/components/ui/' | head -20)
Bash(cd E:/Projects/app-template && grep -r 'from "@/lib/utils"' apps/app/src --include='*.tsx' --include='*.ts' | grep -v 'apps/app/src/components/ui/' | head -20)
Bash(cd E:/Projects/app-template && grep -r 'from "@/hooks/' apps/app/src --include='*.tsx' --include='*.ts' | grep -v 'apps/app/src/components/ui/' | head -20)

Bash(cd E:/Projects/app-template && rm -rf apps/app/src/components/ui && rm -f apps/app/src/hooks/use-mobile.ts apps/app/src/hooks/use-tablet.ts apps/app/src/hooks/use-infinite-scroll.ts && rm -f apps/app/src/lib/utils.ts apps/app/src/lib/create-safe-context.ts && rm -f apps/app/src/globals.css && echo "done")
